dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.hint: Manage automation, LLM cost, manual runs and pending approvals here.
dashboard.refreshError: Threads token refresh FAILED — see runbook: re-run OAuth before expiry
dashboard.automationHint: Per category x format, toggle automatic generation and pick the target channels, then press Save. The time in each column header is the automatic schedule (collection runs daily at 06:00 JST).
dashboard.channelToggleHint: Which channels appear here is controlled by "Global channels" on the Settings page.
dashboard.generateHint: Short posts publish to the enabled channels right after generation. Article/report create a draft and publish after approval (report launches the Research Agent with an auto-selected theme).
dashboard.manualChannelsHint: Pick the target channels. X / Threads only support short posts, so article/report are disabled while either is selected.

chat.title: Research chat
chat.subtitle: Sharpen an idea (sparring), or have sources found and read for you and cited (research).
chat.modeChatHint: A partner that pushes back on your assumptions. No sources.
chat.modeResearchHint: Reads Diet records, government documents, papers and news, then answers with citations.
chat.placeholder: What do you want to think through?
chat.handoffNote: Anything drafted from chat stays a draft. Publishing happens on the approvals screen.

drafts.title: Approvals
drafts.autoDeleteNote: Drafts left unapproved are auto-deleted after 30 days.
drafts.confirmPublish: Publish this post to the selected channels?

posts.title: Post history
posts.hint: Click a title to see the full content. Deleting selected posts also removes the real posts on X, Threads and Notion.
posts.confirmDeletePosts: Delete the selected posts? The live posts on X/Threads/Notion are removed too.
posts.confirmDeleteChannel: Delete the live post on this channel?

focus.title: Keywords & requests
focus.hint: Set focus keywords and your standing requests per category x format. Both are injected into the generation prompts automatically.
focus.multilingualNote: Keywords and requests can be written in Korean, Japanese, or English (mixed is fine). They are honoured regardless of language, and never change the output language of the posts.
focus.requestsPlaceholder: e.g. Emphasise regulatory developments. Always cite figures and primary sources.

research.title: Research reports
research.hint: Deep-dive research reports (the report format). Launch a run, watch it collect evidence and verify claims, then approve the three-language draft.
research.launchHint: Leave the theme blank to auto-select from recent items.
research.themePlaceholder: e.g. AI regulation across the EU, US and Japan
research.traceHint: Per-call prompts, outputs, latency and nesting, read live from LangSmith. Not stored in Firestore.
research.traceTruncated: Payload truncated — open in LangSmith for the full text.
research.traceClipped: Trace is large; showing the first {count} spans.

sources.title: Sources
sources.collectHint: Test sources by running the collect job and checking the run history on the Settings page.

prompts.title: Prompt templates
prompts.focusKeywordsHint: Keywords to emphasise for this category x format. Prioritised in both collection (web search) and article generation — other major news is still picked up. Blank = no change. Lets you steer focus without touching the system prompt.
prompts.customInstructionsHint: Standing requests for this category x format. Korean, Japanese, or English all work. Appended to the generation prompt automatically; the output language never changes.
prompts.placeholders: Placeholders: '{items}' '{category}' '{date}' '{language}' '{keywords}' (+short: '{x_language}' '{threads_language}' '{notion_language}'; +article: '{theme}' '{outline}'). Focus keywords are appended automatically, so '{keywords}' is optional.

channels.title: Channel matrix
channels.hint: Language and on/off per category x format x channel. Short posts publish automatically; article/report go through draft approval. Channels switched off in "Global channels" (Settings) never publish, even if enabled here.

settings.title: Settings
settings.globalChannelsHint: A channel switched off here stops publishing across all categories and disappears from the dashboard toggles (defaults: Notion on / X & Threads off).
settings.shortRequireApproval: Require approval for short posts too (safety valve)
settings.xAllowUrlOnShort: Allow URLs in short X posts ($0.20/post instead of $0.015)
settings.jobsHint: Run any job immediately (collect = item collection).
